dimensions.name: domain_modeling
dimensions.title: Domain Modeling
dimensions.description: Correct use of DDD building blocks: aggregates, value objects, entities, domain events, domain services, policies

dimensions.name: encapsulation
dimensions.title: Encapsulation
dimensions.description: Business rules inside domain objects, not leaked to services/controllers. Domain objects protect their own invariants.

dimensions.name: architecture_compliance
dimensions.title: Architecture Compliance
dimensions.description: Respecting layer boundaries, project conventions, separation of concerns, dependency direction

dimensions.name: extensibility
dimensions.title: Extensibility
dimensions.description: OCP, Strategy/Policy patterns, ease of adding similar features without modifying existing code

dimensions.name: test_quality
dimensions.title: Test Quality
dimensions.description: Test coverage, isolation from externals, edge cases, matching existing test conventions
